final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-grade Chinese infographic poster featuring a photorealistic full-body figure in traditional Chinese ethnic minority costume, structured as a scholarly illustrated reference plate (图鉴式信息图).

Style/medium: photorealistic central figure rendered with documentary precision, surrounded by clean editorial infographic layout; overall aesthetic of National Museum of China exhibition panels and historical costume atlases (服饰图鉴); no poster glamour, no e-commerce styling, no anime or cosplay feel
Composition: portrait orientation, full-body standing figure centered slightly left; structured zones radiating outward — left column for structural annotation, upper-right for material swatches, mid-right for pattern and color analysis, bottom band for assembly sequence and summary; generous white gutters between zones
Subject: a female figure in a complete, historically accurate Chinese ethnic minority costume (自动选取最具代表性的少数民族服饰体系，如苗族、彝族、藏族、侗族等), wearing layered garments with embroidered collar, pleated skirt or wrapped robe, silver headpiece and chest ornaments, hand-stitched textile details visible at cuffs and hem; full-body standing pose, neutral and dignified
Scene/backdrop: warm off-white background with subtle handmade paper texture (绢纸白 / 浅茶色), faint grid or silk-weave grain; no environmental scene, no props beyond the figure
Lighting/mood: soft, even diffused studio light with slight warm cast; no dramatic shadows; scholarly, restrained, collectible
Color palette: background anchored in 米白／绢纸白／浅茶色; costume colors drawn from the selected ethnic tradition (deep indigo, crimson, silver, gold embroidery thread as appropriate); annotation lines and text in deep ink-black or dark charcoal; accent color for section headers in muted vermilion or slate blue
Materials/textures: visible woven textile grain on garment surface, hand-embroidery thread relief, hammered silver ornament surface, natural dye color variation, brocade sheen — all rendered with photorealistic surface fidelity
Text (verbatim): layout must contain the following Chinese text blocks, all in simplified Chinese (简体中文), printed clearly and legibly with no garbled characters, no pinyin, no English —
  顶部主标题区：「[民族名] 传统服饰」大字标题 + 副标题「结构·材质·纹样·文化图鉴」+ 两至三句导语说明该服饰的历史背景与文化地位；
  左侧结构拆解区：引线标注头饰、领饰、上衣、腰带、裙摆/裤装、绣花鞋等关键部件，每条引线末端附简短中文说明（部件名称 + 工艺特征）；
  右上材质工艺区：3–4 个材质小样方块，每块附中文说明（如「手工蜡染棉布」「银制錾花胸牌」「丝线盘绣」）；
  右中纹样色彩区：主色板色块（4–5色）+ 纹样样本图案 + 每项附中文文化寓意说明；
  底部流程与总结区：穿着顺序流程图（从里到外，步骤编号，中文标注）+ 核心特征总结文字框（3–5条要点）
Constraints: all visible text must be simplified Chinese (简体中文), legible at print resolution, no lorem ipsum, no English, no pinyin; annotation leader lines must connect accurately to the correct garment part; layout zones must be clearly delineated with thin rules or subtle tonal separation; infographic must read as a complete, self-contained reference plate
Avoid: poster glamour lighting, studio photography backdrop, e-commerce product-shot feel, anime or illustration style, cosplay aesthetic, decorative flourishes unrelated to the subject, garbled or placeholder text, misaligned annotation lines, fake or blurred material swatches, over-saturated colors

Avoid: poster glamour lighting, studio photography backdrop, e-commerce product-shot feel, anime or illustration style, cosplay aesthetic, decorative flourishes unrelated to the subject, garbled or placeholder text, misaligned annotation lines, fake or blurred material swatches, over-saturated colors", "size": "1152x1536", "quality": "medium", "n": 1, "output_format": "png"}
